case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ERICKA DENISE MEADOWS ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MEADOWS, ERICKA DENISE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MEADOWS, ERICKA DENISE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEADOWS, ERICKA DENISE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 140 JONES STREET, #211, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
